name: k-session
title: K-session
description: A multi-slide 12:4 Chinese Dunhuang-inspired PPT deck skill with dual corner logos, abstract silk-light backgrounds, concise cards, and business-ready layouts.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成多页 12:4 敦煌风 PPT 演示，内置双角 Logo、丝绸光感背景、信息卡与业务叙事版式。
description_i18n.en: Generate a multi-slide 12:4 Chinese Dunhuang-inspired PPT deck with corner logos, silk-light backgrounds, and concise business layouts.

query.zh-CN: 使用 K-session，为 {{audience}} 将“{{topic}}”制作成一套页数由内容量与叙事需要决定的 12:4 敦煌风 PPT 演示。必须输出多页可翻页 deck（含封面和结束页），不可生成单页长图或单页网页。以用户在主输入框提供的内容为主要材料；补充素材（如有）：{{source_content}}。保留双 Logo、亮色抽象丝绸光感背景和可自由组合的混合边框信息卡；标题与副标题均保持一行。
query.en: Use K-session to make a 12:4 Chinese Dunhuang-inspired PPT deck about {{topic}} for {{audience}}, choosing its slide count from the amount of material and the narrative needs. It must be a navigable multi-slide deck including cover and closing, never a one-page image or webpage. Use the user's main-composer prompt as the primary source and this optional supplemental material: {{source_content}}. Keep the dual logos, bright abstract silk-light backgrounds, and freely composable framed/borderless information cards.

inputs.name: source_content
inputs.label: 补充素材（可选）
inputs.placeholder: 粘贴需要提炼成演示的中文素材

inputs.name: cover_background
inputs.label: 封面 / 尾页背景（可选）
